zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Willoughby於大約1385年出生在英國素福爾可帕哈姆時，他的父親William Willoughby15歲，母親Lucy le Strange19歲。他於1426年與Joan Arundel在英國素可帕哈姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1440年在他的家鄉享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Willoughby于大约1385年出生在英国素福爾可帕哈姆时，他的父亲William Willoughby15岁，母亲Lucy le Strange19岁。他于1426年与Joan Arundel在英国素可帕哈姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1440年在他的家乡享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Willoughby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Willoughby, for example in Leicestershire, Lincolnshire, Nottinghamshire, and Warwickshire. They are named from an Old English +wilig ‘willow’ + Old Norse bȳ ‘farmstead, village’.

variants.name: Wilby
meanings: habitational name from any of the places called Wilby, in Suffolk, Norfolk, and Northamptonshire. The first placename is probably named from an Old English wilig ‘willow’ + Old English bēag ‘circle, ring’; the Norfolk placename derives from Old English wilig + bēag or Old Norse bý ‘farmstead, village’; the Northamptonshire placename derives from the Old Norse personal name Vili + bý.
Redmonds has demonstrated that in the parish of Hipperholme, and subsequently elsewhere in Yorkshire, Wilby occurs as a variant of Willoughby .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Willoughby was born about 1385, in Parham, Suffolk, England, his father, William Willoughby, was 15 and his mother, Lucy le Strange, was 19. He married Joan Arundel in 1426, in Parham, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died about 1440, in his hometown, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Willoughby est né environ 1385, à Parham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, William Willoughby, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Lucy le Strange, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Joan Arundel en 1426, à Parham, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé environ 1440, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Willoughby um 1385 in Parham, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Willoughby 15 und seine Mutter Lucy le Strange 19. Er hat 1426 in Parham, Sussex, England Joan Arundel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb um 1440 im Alter von 57 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Willoughby è nato il circa 1385 nel Parham, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, William Willoughby, aveva 15 anni e il suo madre, Lucy le Strange, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Joan Arundel nel 1426, nel Parham, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì circa 1440, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Willoughbyが約1385年にイギリススフォルクパーハムで生まれた時，父William Willoughbyは15歳，母Lucy le Strangeは19歳であった。1426年にイギリススセックスパーハムでJoan Arundelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は約1440年に故郷で57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Willoughby(이)가 대략 1385년 영국 수폴크 파람에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Willoughby(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Lucy le Strange(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1426년 영국 수세스 파람에서 Joan Arundel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1440년 그의 고향에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1385–about 1440: tany ho any amin'ny 1385–tany ho any amin'ny 1440

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Willoughby nasceu aproximadamente 1385, em Parham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Willoughby, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Lucy le Strange, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Arundel em 1426, em Parham, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1440, em sua cidade natal, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Willoughby родился около 1385 г. в местности парам, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени William Willoughby было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucy le Strange, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Arundel в 1426 г. в местности парам, суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер около 1440 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 57 лет.

sm.about 1385–about 1440: e tusa o le 1385–e tusa o le 1440

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Willoughby nació aproximadamente 1385, en Parham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, William Willoughby, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Lucy le Strange, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Joan Arundel en 1426, en Parham, Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1440, en su pueblo, a la edad de 57 años.
